productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Rajasthan Royals Military Blue Cap
description: &nbsp; Composition Royal blue military cap made of cotton with rounded crown, stiff visor, velcro adjustable strap at the back, team branding on the front crown panel and puma branding at the back Fitting Comfort Wash care Hand wash Gear up in true military style to cheer the Rajasthan Royals to victory with this royal blue cap from puma. Made of pure cotton, this rounded crown cap will keep your head dry and comfortable while you are in the health cheering your favourite team. The short, stiff visor ensures your face is shielded from the sun or harsh light, while the adjustable velcro strap at the back ensures a customized, snug Fit. Your loyalty is well advertised with the team branding on the front and Puma branding at the back of this royal blue cap.
